title: cassinia albida
intro: Cassinia albida, also known as White Shiny Cassinia, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cassinia albida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. Cassinia albida can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat various ailments.
